test_files.subject: BienBanBanGiaoStateService
test_files.notes: State machine transition guard + nextState mapping; covers role enforcement (LANH_DAO, GIAM_SAT, HQDK) and pending-request locking

test_files.subject: KiemHoaHoStateService
test_files.notes: Covers assign state guard, role checks (PHAN_CONG, LANH_DAO), submit result, and cancel rejection after da_co_ket_qua

test_files.subject: SealingService
test_files.notes: Covers GIAM_SAT role enforcement, state machine delegation, and PostgreSQL unique-constraint (23505) → ConflictException mapping

test_files.subject: CtdtZodValidator
test_files.notes: Validates strict Zod schema parsing for van_don CTDT type (AC-F008-07); rejects unknown keys

test_files.subject: validateIso6346Basic
test_files.notes: ISO 6346 container number validation: length check, trim+uppercase normalization

coverage_summary.coverage_notes: Tests focus on state machine guards and pure utility functions. No integration tests for external adapters (VNACCS, eTax, eManifest). No tests for m01–m05 or m09–m10.
